productDisplayName: Timberland Unisex Suede Restorer Brush Shoe Accessories
description: This soft crepe rubber brush revives the nap on any suede or nubuck leather article. Features a varnished wood handle and soft crepe rubber bristles. Method of application Gently rub the brush back and forth over dirty or matted areas first Use longer brush strokes to raise the nap on the entire surface For use on all suede and nubuck leather 4¾ inches long x 1¾ inches wide
